# Brown-Zudilin dual F_7 companion exact-coefficient probe

- Report id: `bz_dual_f7_companion_probe_v1`
- Source: `Brown and Zudilin, On cellular rational approximations to zeta(5)` (https://arxiv.org/abs/2210.03391)
- Source version: `v3`
- This report tracks the missing exact companion sequences attached to the dual `F_7` linear form: the rational constant term and the exact `zeta(3)` coefficient.
- Each component is hashed as a provisional exact-term sequence object. No recurrence is claimed here.

## Totally symmetric dual companion sequences

- Case id: `totally_symmetric`
- Base `a`: `(1, 1, 1, 1, 1, 1, 1, 1)`
- Base `b`: `(3, 1, 1, 1, 1, 1, 1, 1)`

- Provisional sequence hash: `6d22cd687f0c60c8c3c0851b699ea0ff6c6fc2b1c3d08303f9c3c05a12315f2c`
